## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Kalil to the Innerwell content strategy and workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Shift:** Innerwell's content strategy pivoted from uncompetitive "condition-led" topics (e.g., ADHD) to "treatment-led" clusters (e.g., Ketamine Therapy) to build authority and rank for high-intent keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Programmatic Workflow:** A programmatic workflow uses Atlas for initial drafts, followed by Claude for restructuring to a standard template, and manual post-processing for quality control.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [**High-Intent Focus:** The "Ketamine Therapy for \[Condition\]" series targets high-intent users actively seeking treatment, using a consistent structure that includes a direct CTA to Innerwell's services.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [**Action Item:** Kalil will produce 3 articles this week (excluding "psychosis") for Friday delivery, submitting drafts to Matt by Thursday morning for review.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)

## Topics

### Innerwell: Business Context

  - [**Service:** Telehealth ketamine therapy.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [**USP:** At-home lozenge delivery, avoiding clinic visits required for IV/IM treatments.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [**Other Offerings:** EMDR, psychedelic integration, general therapy, and psychiatry.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [**Problem:** The original "condition-led" strategy failed to rank, as keywords like "what is ADHD" were dominated by high-authority sites (.gov, .edu).](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Solution:** The new "treatment-led" strategy builds authority around specific services.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [**Current Focus:** The Ketamine Therapy cluster, Innerwell's core USP.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [**Future Focus:** The EMDR cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [**Goal:** Establish a repeatable content rubric with the Ketamine Therapy cluster, then apply it to other services.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)

### Ketamine Therapy Cluster Structure

  - [The cluster is built around three user intent stages:](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
    1.  [**General Awareness:** Top-of-funnel content (e.g., "Does ketamine show up on a drug test?").](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
    2.  [**Treatment Access:** Mid-funnel content on logistics (e.g., insurance coverage, telehealth eligibility).](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
    3.  [**Programmatic Series:** High-intent articles targeting users actively seeking treatment.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### Programmatic Workflow: "Ketamine Therapy for \[Condition\]"

  - [**Purpose:** Target high-intent users with a scalable, templated approach.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [**Standard Article Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [What is \[Condition\]?](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [Traditional treatments & limitations.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
      - [How does ketamine therapy work?](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
      - [How Innerwell approaches it (the conversion point).](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [Is it right for me?](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [**CTA:** "Try with Innerwell" → Free assessment.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [**Generation Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [**1. Research:** Analyze top-ranking SERP results to identify key elements and find opportunities for "information gain."](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [**2. Draft (Atlas):** Use a neutral template to generate an initial draft.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
      - [**3. Restructure (Claude):** Use Claude to align the Atlas output with the standard template, providing "gold standard" examples for reference.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [**4. Post-Processing (Manual):**](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
          - [**Internal Links:** Manually add \~5 links from the "Internal Linking Repo" to top-performing pages, as LLMs are unreliable for this.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
          - [**Quality Control:** Use the "On-Page Checklist" to ensure all SEO and formatting standards are met.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kalil:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [Produce 3 articles this week (excluding "psychosis").](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [Submit drafts to Matt by Thursday morning for review.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
      - [Use the "On-Page Checklist" and "Internal Linking Repo" during post-processing.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
      - [Save final drafts in the shared Google Drive folder.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
      - [Review Kalil's drafts on Thursday morning.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
      - [Finalize the "psychosis" article.](https://fathom.video/share/ZGbqdi5VKydywuvUtz5AsE2Y9dgwh2-k?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
